free_text: Light-particle emission in the reaction of 93Nb+14N at
Department of Physics and Laboratory of
Nuclear Studies
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Department of Physics
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 2.5 mg/cm**2.
AVF cyclotron at Research Center for
Nuclear Physics
Solid angle of detector is 1.2 msr.
To obtain E signals fomr all particles and DE
signals from all particles except hydrogen
isotopes with low energies
To obtain DE signals from hydrogen isotopes
with high energies
Maximum uncertainty in absolute magnitude of
the cross sections (<15%)
On. Converted from NRDF D1192
ANG is polar angle between beam and proton in
laboratory system
No information on source of uncertainties
